steps.label: New User Registration
steps.description: Welcome! Please create your account by entering your registration details below. Your information will be used to set up your secure profile. All fields marked with an asterisk (*) are required. Make sure to use a valid email address and a strong password. You will receive notifications on your registered mobile number. If you already have an account, please use the login option.

fields.label: Email Address
fields.error_message: Please enter a valid email address.

fields.label: Mobile Number
fields.error_message: Please enter a valid mobile number.

data_validation: Password and Confirm Password must match.
Email address must be unique in the system.
Mobile number must be in valid phone format.
Password must meet minimum security requirements (e.g., length, character types).
All required fields must be completed before submission.

buttons.label: Register
buttons.description: Submit registration details to create your account.

steps.label: Process Registration Submission
steps.description: On registration submission, create a new user account record using the provided details. Store credentials securely (e.g., password hashing). Initiate audit logging for the registration event. Check for duplicate email address in the user database. If no duplicate is found, proceed to the next step; if a duplicate exists, display an error message on the registration screen.

rules.label: Create User Account Record
rules.logic: Create a new user record with the provided Email Address, Full Name, and Mobile Number if all required fields are present and valid.

rules.label: Store Credentials Securely
rules.logic: Hash the Password before storing. Ensure Password and Confirm Password match. Do not store plain text passwords.

rules.label: Initiate Audit Logging
rules.logic: Log the registration attempt with timestamp, Email Address, and result (success/failure).

rules.label: Check for Duplicate Email
rules.logic: Search user database for existing record with the same Email Address. If found, abort registration and display error; if not, continue.

steps.label: Profile Setup
steps.description: Set up your profile by providing your personal details. This information helps us personalize your experience and verify your identity. Please enter your current address, date of birth, and select your preferred contact method. You may also upload a profile photo. Use the 'Search Prior History' button to check if you have any existing records in our system. Review the results and select any relevant prior history to link to your profile.

fields.label: Date of Birth
fields.error_message: Please enter your date of birth.

fields.label: Preferred Contact Method
fields.error_message: Please select your preferred contact method.

fields.label: Profile Photo
fields.error_message: Please upload a valid image file.

data_validation: Date of birth cannot be in the future.
Address must be a valid postal address.
If preferred contact method is Phone or SMS, mobile number must be valid and present in profile.
Profile photo must be a valid image file format (jpg, png, etc.).
All required fields must be completed before saving profile.

buttons.label: Search Prior History
buttons.description: Search for any prior records matching your name and date of birth.

buttons.label: Save Profile
buttons.description: Save your profile details and link any selected prior history.

steps.label: Process Search Prior History
steps.description: When the user initiates a search for prior history, query the domain database for records matching the user's Full Name and Date of Birth. Display any matching results on the profile setup screen for user review and selection.

rules.label: Search Domain Database
rules.logic: Query the domain database for records where Full Name and Date of Birth match the user's input.

rules.label: Display Results
rules.logic: Present any matching prior history records on the profile setup screen for user review and possible selection.

steps.label: Process Profile Submission
steps.description: On profile submission, store all entered profile details. If the user has selected any prior history records, link them to the user's profile. Update the audit log to record the profile submission event. Mark the user's profile status as complete.

rules.label: Store Profile Details
rules.logic: Save Address, Date of Birth, Preferred Contact Method, and Profile Photo (if provided) to the user's profile record.

rules.label: Link Selected Prior History
rules.logic: If the user has selected any prior history records, associate those records with the user's profile.

rules.label: Update Audit Log
rules.logic: Log the profile submission event with timestamp and user identifier.

rules.label: Mark Profile as Complete
rules.logic: Set the user's profile status to 'Complete' upon successful submission.

steps.label: Profile Confirmation
steps.description: Review all the information you have entered for your account and profile. Please verify that your details are accurate and complete. If you need to make changes, you can go back to the previous steps. Once you are satisfied, click 'Confirm & Finish' to complete your onboarding. By confirming, you acknowledge that the information provided is true and correct to the best of your knowledge.
data_validation: All required profile and registration fields must be completed before confirmation.
User must acknowledge that information is accurate.
No duplicate or conflicting information in profile.

buttons.label: Confirm & Finish
buttons.description: Finalize your onboarding and activate your account.

steps.label: Process Confirmation Submission
steps.description: When the user confirms and finishes onboarding, finalize the user account setup. Update the user's status to 'Active'. Generate compliance documentation as required. Send a welcome notification to the user.

rules.label: Finalize User Onboarding
rules.logic: Complete all onboarding processes and ensure all required data is present.

rules.label: Update Status to 'Active'
rules.logic: Change the user's account status from 'Confirmation Pending' to 'Active'.

rules.label: Generate Compliance Documentation
rules.logic: Create and store any required compliance documents for the user account.

rules.label: Send Welcome Notification
rules.logic: Dispatch a welcome message to the user via their preferred contact method.
